title: Squirrel Removal in Canarsie, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Canarsie, Brooklyn. Humane extraction, entry sealing, and attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving Canarsie homes. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Squirrels in your Canarsie attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Canarsie, Brooklyn, protecting homes from property damage and noise. Our licensed technicians use humane methods to safely remove squirrels and prevent re-entry, with services ranging from $900 to $2,500 depending on infestation severity.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Canarsie homeowners for years with fast, effective squirrel removal solutions. Our team understands the unique challenges of Brooklyn properties and provides same-day emergency service, full warranties, and follow-up inspections to ensure your home stays squirrel-free.
localContext: Canarsie's tree-lined streets near Canarsie Park and the waterfront areas along Jamaica Bay create ideal habitats for squirrels seeking access to attics and soffits. The neighborhood's mix of single-family homes, brick two-family houses, and older residential buildings near Seaview Avenue and Flatlands Avenue are particularly vulnerable to squirrel intrusions during nesting seasons.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Canarsie?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Canarsie typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the size of the infestation, number of entry points, and whether attic cleanup or insulation replacement is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Canarsie home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls (especially at dawn and dusk), visible entry holes in soffits or rooflines, chewed wires or wood, squirrel droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your roof. If you notice any of these signs, contact us for an immediate inspection.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, ethical methods for squirrel removal in Canarsie. Our process includes live trapping and relocation when appropriate, one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not return, and careful attention to avoid separating mothers from babies during nesting season.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Canarsie home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Canarsie for urgent situations. Most squirrel removal projects take 3-7 days from initial trapping to complete exclusion and sealing of entry points. Timeline varies based on the number of squirrels and extent of the infestation, but we work efficiently to resolve your problem as quickly as possible.
